div.h1: SYN Cookies — Stateless SYN Flood Defense
div.p: Trade-off: Survives SYN floods but loses TCP options negotiation (MSS, WScale, SACK)

g.text: Total: 32 bits — fits in TCP seq field

div.p: No ACKs sent (spoofed IPs or malicious client)

g.text: uint32_t hash = siphash24(sip ^ dip ^ sport ^ dport
